findings.title: Pending-challenge indicator absent from roster/class header (Issue #12)
findings.where: 25WT 2차 TOP ONLINE / class header and roster
findings.repro: Navigate to /classes/GNktwcqI18vyAps3iJDf and inspect for pending challenge badge
findings.expected: Pending-challenge count/badge should appear on roster or class header
findings.actual: No pending-challenge indicator or badge found in the DOM

findings.title: Name-edit pencil/button not found or not functional
findings.repro: Navigate to /classes/GNktwcqI18vyAps3iJDf, look for pencil/edit icon on student names
findings.expected: Clicking pencil icon opens inline editor with input + Cancel/Check buttons
findings.actual: Edit button clicked but no text input appeared
